utility_outage.title: Powerful storms cause massive power outages; Paramus outage could extend into midweek

transit.header: Raritan Valley Line rail service is suspended in both directions between High Bridge and Annandale due to ongoing repairs to infrastructure following severe storms. Substitute bus service is being pro
transit.description: Raritan Valley Line rail service is suspended in both directions between High Bridge and Annandale due to ongoing repairs to infrastructure following severe storms. Substitute bus service is being provided.
